items.title: Google Vids now lets you star in your own AI videos
items.summary: Google is adding personalized AI avatars to Vids that let users create videos starring a digital version of themselves, alongside Gemini Omni-powered tools for generating and editing videos from prompts and reference images.

items.title: Roblox launches an AI-powered game-creation feature in its mobile app
items.summary: Roblox's new "Build" feature lets users generate basic games using a single text prompt.

items.title: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Embed Ranks #1 Overall on RTEB, Advancing Agentic Retrieval
items.summary: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Embed Ranks #1 Overall on RTEB, Advancing Agentic Retrieval

items.title: Why teens deserve access to safe AI
items.summary: Learn how OpenAI is making ChatGPT safer for teens with age-appropriate protections, learning tools, parental controls, and expert partnerships.

items.title: Connect more of your apps to Search
items.summary: You’ll be able to securely link and interact with your go-to services directly in AI Mode.

items.title: Create, edit and star in videos with two Google Vids updates
items.summary: Gemini Omni and personal avatars in Google Vids make video creation easier than ever.

items.title: Google’s AI Mode now lets you link and interact with select apps
items.summary: With this new update, Google is expanding AI Mode beyond answering questions and into completing tasks across the apps they use regularly.

items.title: Yes, you can now order DoorDash from the command line
items.summary: DoorDash is opening a limited beta of dd-cli, a command-line tool that lets developers and AI agents search stores, build carts, and place orders from the terminal, marking another step toward software designed for AI agents instead of j...

items.title: Why is OpenAI selling a ChatGPT basketball?
items.summary: You may have heard that OpenAI released its first piece of hardware this week. You may not have heard about the ChatGPT basketball.

items.title: How a former DeepMind researcher raised at a $300M pre-seed valuation before launching a product
items.summary: Drawing on more than a decade spent helping build some of the world's most influential AI systems, including research that later informed the development of ChatGPT, Andrew Dai explains why he believes visual AI is one of the next major...

items.title: Why AMI Labs’ Alexandre LeBrun won’t call his AI ‘AGI’ or ‘superintelligence’
items.summary: While everyone in AI is chasing "superintelligence," Alexandre LeBrun, CEO of Yann LeCun’s world model startup, AMI Labs, dismisses the word.

items.title: Moonshot’s upcoming Kimi 3 is expected to close the gap with Anthropic’s Opus 4.8
items.summary: The FT reports Kimi K3 will be the largest open AI model from China, with a parameter count between 2 trillion and 3 trillion.
